nm:output.nm:control_stream:
;; 1. Based on: 14 ;; 2. Description: ;; IIV on KOUT- prelim Cohort 3 CD4+ ;; 3. Label: ;; 1 cpt input turnover model ;; 4. Structural model: ;; 1 cpt input turnover model ;; 5. Covariate model: ;; 6. Inter-individual variability: ;; CL, V ;; 7. Inter-occasion variability: ;; NONE ;; 8. Residual variability: ;; Additive on log scale ;; 9. Estimation: ;; FOCE $PROBLEM ABCURO PKPD MODELING $INPUT ID SUBJID=DROP TIME DV BQL EVID AMT TYPE DAY COUNTBASE COUNTCFB COUNTPCFB PLACEBO DOSE WT CL V KA LNDV $DATA nm_pkpd_cohort2b_indpk.csv IGNORE=@ IGNORE=(BQL.EQ.1) IGNORE=(TYPE.EQ.1) IGNORE=(TYPE.GT.2) IGNORE=(PLACEBO.EQ.1) $SUBROUTINE ADVAN13 TOL=12 $ABBREVIATED COMRES=1 $MODEL COMP(depot,DEFDOSE) COMP(PLASMA) COMP(TC1) COMP(TC2) COMP(TC3) COMP(KLRG1PLASMA) $PK
TVPD0 = THETA(1) TVTHALF = THETA(2)
; PK compartment F1 = EXP(1.1)/(1+EXP(1.1)) ; this was fixed to that value in run4
;P D model components MU_1 = TVPD0 ; PD0 MU_2 = TVTHALF ; KOUT MU_3 = THETA(3) ; EMAX MU_4 = THETA(4) ; EC50 MU_5 = THETA(5) ; KTR
ERR_ADD = THETA(6) ERR_PROP = THETA(7)
; Effect parameters and initiation PD0 = EXP(MU_1+ETA(1)) THALF = EXP(MU_2+ETA(2)) EMAX = EXP(MU_3+ETA(3)) ; simple scalar of drug effect KOUT = LOG(2)/THALF MAXEFF = (1/(1-1/100)-1)
KIN = KOUT * PD0 A_0(6) = PD0
EC50 = EXP(MU_4+ETA(4)) KTR = EXP(MU_5+ETA(5))
; Capture dose time IF(NEWIND.NE.2) COM(1)=TIME IF(EVID.EQ.1) COM(1)=TIME
$DES
C2 = A(2)/V * 1000
DADT(1) = - KA*A(1) DADT(2) = KA*A(1) - CL*C2 DADT(3) = KIN - KTR*A(3) DADT(4) = KTR*A(3) - KTR*A(4) DADT(5) = KTR*A(4) - KTR*A(5) DADT(6) = KTR*A(5) - KOUT*A(6) - EMAX*C2/(EC50+C2)
$ERROR IPRED = A(6) AEFF = IPRED W = sqrt(ERR_ADD**2 + ERR_PROP**2 * IPRED**2)
IF(IPRED.LT.0) THEN IPRED=0 W=1 ENDIF
Y = IPRED+W*EPS(1) IRES = DV - IPRED IWRES = IRES/W
$THETA (1,3.09018,7) ; PD0; Base count; LOG $THETA 6.36184 ; THALF KOUT; h; LOG $THETA (-5,-1.5075,5) ; EMAX; prlwstz; LOG $THETA 1 FIX ; EC50; ng/L; LOG $THETA -1.53008 ; KTR; 1/h; LOG $THETA 0 FIX ; Additive error (log); cells/L; LIN $THETA 0.404737 ; Proportional error; ; LIN $OMEGA 0.416064 ; IIV(PD0) 0.09 ; IIV(KOUT) 0.359259 ; IIV(EMAX) 0 FIX ; IIV(EC50) 0 FIX ; IIV(KTR) $SIGMA 1 FIX ; SIGMA $ESTIMATION METHOD=COND INTER NSIG=3 SIGL=9 MAXEVALS=9999 PRINT=1 NOABORT $COVARIANCE PRINT=E UNCONDITIONAL MATRIX=S $TABLE ID TIME EVID PRED IPRED RES IRES WRES IWRES CWRES DV MDV C2 FORMAT=s1PG15.8 NOAPPEND NOPRINT ONEHEADER FILE=sdtab15 $TABLE ID DOSE V CL KA AEFF ETAS(1:LAST) FORMAT=s1PE13.7 NOAPPEND ONEHEADER NOPRINT FORMAT=s1PG15.8 FILE=patab15 $TABLE ID TIME DV IPRED EVID CWRES IWRES DOSE WT AMT FORMAT=S1PG15.8 NOAPPEND ONEHEADER NOPRINT FILE=cotab15 $TABLE ID TYPE NOPRINT ONEHEADER FORMAT=S1PG15.8 FILE=catab15
nm:output.nm:nmtran:
WARNINGS AND ERRORS (IF ANY) FOR PROBLEM 1
(WARNING 2) NM-TRAN INFERS THAT THE DATA ARE POPULATION.
(WARNING 48) DES-DEFINED ITEMS ARE COMPUTED ONLY WHEN EVENT TIME INCREASES. E.G., DISPLAYED VALUES ASSOCIATED WITH THE FIRST EVENT RECORD OF AN INDIVIDUAL RECORD ARE COMPUTED WITH (THE LAST ADVANCE TO) AN EVENT TIME OF THE PRIOR INDIVIDUAL RECORD.

nm:nonmem.nm:license_information: License Registered to: qPharmetra Expiration Date: 14 JUL 2022 Current Date: 23 FEB 2022 Days until program expires : 141
nm:nonmem.nm:program_information: 1NONLINEAR MIXED EFFECTS MODEL PROGRAM (NONMEM) VERSION 7.4.3 ORIGINALLY DEVELOPED BY STUART BEAL, LEWIS SHEINER, AND ALISON BOECKMANN CURRENT DEVELOPERS ARE ROBERT BAUER, ICON DEVELOPMENT SOLUTIONS, AND ALISON BOECKMANN. IMPLEMENTATION, EFFICIENCY, AND STANDARDIZATION PERFORMED BY NOUS INFOSYSTEMS.

nm:problem.nm:problem_information:
PROBLEM NO.: 1 ABCURO PKPD MODELING 0DATA CHECKOUT RUN: NO DATA SET LOCATED ON UNIT NO.: 2 THIS UNIT TO BE REWOUND: NO NO. OF DATA RECS IN DATA SET: 105 NO. OF DATA ITEMS IN DATA SET: 19 ID DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 1 DEP VARIABLE IS DATA ITEM NO.: 3 MDV DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 19 0INDICES PASSED TO SUBROUTINE PRED: 5 2 6 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0LABELS FOR DATA ITEMS: ID TIME DV BQL EVID AMT TYPE DAY COUNTBASE COUNTCFB COUNTPCFB PLACEBO DOSE WT CL V KA LNDV MDV 0(NONBLANK) LABELS FOR PRED-DEFINED ITEMS: C2 IPRED AEFF IRES IWRES 0FORMAT FOR DATA: (6(3E20.0/)/1F2.0)
TOT. NO. OF OBS RECS: 83 TOT. NO. OF INDIVIDUALS: 7 0LENGTH OF THETA: 7 0DEFAULT THETA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0OMEGA HAS BLOCK FORM: 1 0 2 0 0 3 0 0 0 4 0 0 0 0 5 0DEFAULT OMEGA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0SIGMA HAS SIMPLE DIAGONAL FORM WITH DIMENSION: 1 0DEFAULT SIGMA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF THETA: LOWER BOUND INITIAL EST UPPER BOUND 0.1000E+01 0.3090E+01 0.7000E+01 -0.1000E+07 0.6362E+01 0.1000E+07 -0.5000E+01 -0.1508E+01 0.5000E+01 0.1000E+01 0.1000E+01 0.1000E+01 -0.1000E+07 -0.1530E+01 0.1000E+07 0.0000E+00 0.0000E+00 0.0000E+00 -0.1000E+07 0.4047E+00 0.1000E+07 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF OMEGA: BLOCK SET NO. BLOCK FIXED 1 NO 0.4161E+00 2 NO 0.9000E-01 3 NO 0.3593E+00 4 YES 0.0000E+00 5 YES 0.0000E+00 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF SIGMA: 0.1000E+01 0SIGMA CONSTRAINED TO BE THIS INITIAL ESTIMATE 0COVARIANCE STEP OMITTED: NO R MATRIX SUBSTITUTED: NO S MATRIX SUBSTITUTED: YES EIGENVLS. PRINTED: YES SPECIAL COMPUTATION: NO COMPRESSED FORMAT: NO GRADIENT METHOD USED: NOSLOW SIGDIGITS ETAHAT (SIGLO): -1 SIGDIGITS GRADIENTS (SIGL): -1 EXCLUDE COV FOR FOCE (NOFCOV): NO TURN OFF Cholesky Transposition of R Matrix (CHOLROFF): NO KNUTHSUMOFF: -1 RESUME COV ANALYSIS (RESUME): NO SIR SAMPLE SIZE (SIRSAMPLE): -1 NON-LINEARLY TRANSFORM THETAS DURING COV (THBND): 1 PRECONDTIONING CYCLES (PRECOND): 0 PRECONDTIONING TYPES (PRECONDS): TOS FORCED PRECONDTIONING CYCLES (PFCOND):0 PRECONDTIONING TYPE (PRETYPE): 0 FORCED POS. DEFINITE SETTING: (FPOSDEF):0 0TABLES STEP OMITTED: NO NO. OF TABLES: 4 SEED NUMBER (SEED): 11456 RANMETHOD: 3U MC SAMPLES (ESAMPLE): 300 WRES SQUARE ROOT TYPE (WRESCHOL): EIGENVALUE 0-- TABLE 1 -- 0RECORDS ONLY: ALL 04 COLUMNS APPENDED: NO PRINTED: NO HEADER: YES FILE TO BE FORWARDED: NO FORMAT: s1PG15.8 LFORMAT: RFORMAT: FIXED_EFFECT_ETAS: 0USER-CHOSEN ITEMS: ID TIME EVID PRED IPRED RES IRES WRES IWRES CWRES DV MDV C2 0-- TABLE 2 -- 0RECORDS ONLY: ALL 04 COLUMNS APPENDED: NO PRINTED: NO HEADER: YES FILE TO BE FORWARDED: NO FORMAT: s1PG15.8 LFORMAT: RFORMAT: FIXED_EFFECT_ETAS: 0USER-CHOSEN ITEMS: ID DOSE V CL KA AEFF ETA1 ETA2 ETA3 ETA4 ETA5 0-- TABLE 3 -- 0RECORDS ONLY: ALL 04 COLUMNS APPENDED: NO PRINTED: NO HEADER: YES FILE TO BE FORWARDED: NO FORMAT: S1PG15.8 LFORMAT: RFORMAT: FIXED_EFFECT_ETAS: 0USER-CHOSEN ITEMS: ID TIME DV IPRED EVID CWRES IWRES DOSE WT AMT 0-- TABLE 4 -- 0RECORDS ONLY: ALL 04 COLUMNS APPENDED: YES PRINTED: NO HEADER: YES FILE TO BE FORWARDED: NO FORMAT: S1PG15.8 LFORMAT: RFORMAT: FIXED_EFFECT_ETAS: 0USER-CHOSEN ITEMS: ID TYPE 0WARNING: THE NUMBER OF PARAMETERS TO BE ESTIMATED EXCEEDS THE NUMBER OF INDIVIDUALS WITH DATA. 1DOUBLE PRECISION PREDPP VERSION 7.4.3
GENERAL NONLINEAR KINETICS MODEL WITH STIFF/NONSTIFF EQUATIONS (LSODA, ADVAN13) 0MODEL SUBROUTINE USER-SUPPLIED - ID NO. 9999 0MAXIMUM NO. OF BASIC PK PARAMETERS: 5 0COMPARTMENT ATTRIBUTES COMPT. NO. FUNCTION INITIAL ON/OFF DOSE DEFAULT DEFAULT STATUS ALLOWED ALLOWED FOR DOSE FOR OBS. 1 DEPOT ON YES YES YES YES 2 PLASMA ON YES YES NO NO 3 TC1 ON YES YES NO NO 4 TC2 ON YES YES NO NO 5 TC3 ON YES YES NO NO 6 KLRG1PLASMA ON YES YES NO NO 7 OUTPUT OFF YES NO NO NO INITIAL (BASE) TOLERANCE SETTINGS: NRD (RELATIVE) VALUE(S) OF TOLERANCE: 12 ANRD (ABSOLUTE) VALUE(S) OF TOLERANCE: 12 1 ADDITIONAL PK PARAMETERS - ASSIGNMENT OF ROWS IN GG COMPT. NO. INDICES SCALE BIOAVAIL. ZERO-ORDER ZERO-ORDER ABSORB FRACTION RATE DURATION LAG 1 * 6 * * * 2 * * * * * 3 * * * * * 4 * * * * * 5 * * * * * 6 * * * * * 7 * - - - - - PARAMETER IS NOT ALLOWED FOR THIS MODEL * PARAMETER IS NOT SUPPLIED BY PK SUBROUTINE; WILL DEFAULT TO ONE IF APPLICABLE 0DATA ITEM INDICES USED BY PRED ARE: EVENT ID DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 5 TIME DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 2 DOSE AMOUNT DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 6
0PK SUBROUTINE CALLED WITH EVERY EVENT RECORD. PK SUBROUTINE NOT CALLED AT NONEVENT (ADDITIONAL OR LAGGED) DOSE TIMES. 0PK SUBROUTINE INDICATES THAT COMPARTMENT AMOUNTS ARE INITIALIZED. 0ERROR SUBROUTINE CALLED WITH EVERY EVENT RECORD. 0ERROR SUBROUTINE INDICATES THAT DERIVATIVES OF COMPARTMENT AMOUNTS ARE USED. 0DES SUBROUTINE USES COMPACT STORAGE MODE.

nm:estimation.nm:estimation_title: First Order Conditional Estimation with Interaction
nm:estimation.nm:estimation_information: ESTIMATION STEP OMITTED: NO ANALYSIS TYPE: POPULATION NUMBER OF SADDLE POINT RESET ITERATIONS: 0 GRADIENT METHOD USED: NOSLOW CONDITIONAL ESTIMATES USED: YES CENTERED ETA: NO EPS-ETA INTERACTION: YES LAPLACIAN OBJ. FUNC.: NO NO. OF FUNCT. EVALS. ALLOWED: 9999 NO. OF SIG. FIGURES REQUIRED: 3 INTERMEDIATE PRINTOUT: YES ESTIMATE OUTPUT TO MSF: NO ABORT WITH PRED EXIT CODE 1: NO IND. OBJ. FUNC. VALUES SORTED: NO NUMERICAL DERIVATIVE FILE REQUEST (NUMDER): NONE MAP (ETAHAT) ESTIMATION METHOD (OPTMAP): 0 ETA HESSIAN EVALUATION METHOD (ETADER): 0 INITIAL ETA FOR MAP ESTIMATION (MCETA): 0 SIGDIGITS FOR MAP ESTIMATION (SIGLO): 9 GRADIENT SIGDIGITS OF FIXED EFFECTS PARAMETERS (SIGL): 9 NOPRIOR SETTING (NOPRIOR): OFF NOCOV SETTING (NOCOV): OFF DERCONT SETTING (DERCONT): OFF FINAL ETA RE-EVALUATION (FNLETA): ON EXCLUDE NON-INFLUENTIAL (NON-INFL.) ETAS IN SHRINKAGE (ETASTYPE): NO NON-INFL. ETA CORRECTION (NONINFETA): OFF RAW OUTPUT FILE (FILE): psn.ext EXCLUDE TITLE (NOTITLE): NO EXCLUDE COLUMN LABELS (NOLABEL): NO FORMAT FOR ADDITIONAL FILES (FORMAT): S1PE12.5 PARAMETER ORDER FOR OUTPUTS (ORDER): TSOL WISHART PRIOR DF INTERPRETATION (WISHTYPE):0 KNUTHSUMOFF: 0 INCLUDE LNTWOPI: NO INCLUDE CONSTANT TERM TO PRIOR (PRIORC): NO INCLUDE CONSTANT TERM TO OMEGA (ETA) (OLNTWOPI):NO ADDITIONAL CONVERGENCE TEST (CTYPE=4)?: NO EM OR BAYESIAN METHOD USED: NONE
nm:estimation.nm:termination_information: 0MINIMIZATION TERMINATED DUE TO ROUNDING ERRORS (ERROR=134) NO. OF FUNCTION EVALUATIONS USED: 398 NO. OF SIG. DIGITS UNREPORTABLE
